gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/481)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/481)
text: ذَكَرْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلًا مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا فَأَحْسَنْتُ عَلَيْهِ الثَّنَاءَ فَقَالَ لِي كَيْفَ صَلَاتُهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Abu Ismai Al-Sarraj, from Haroun Bin Kharjat who said,
‘I mentioned to Abu Abdullahasws, a man from our companions, and I praised him well. So heasws said to me: ‘What is the status of his Salāt?’
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Isma’if from abu Isma’if af-Sarraj from Harun ibn Kharijah who has said the following: “Once I spoke before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man of our people and I praised him well. The Imam asked, ‘How is his Salah (prayer)?”’
